metadata.description: Claude Code skills for Ibexa DXP development — content management, PHP API, migrations, SiteAccess, templating, commerce, PIM, search, and more.

plugins.name: ibexa-dxp
plugins.description: Expert Ibexa DXP (formerly eZ Platform) development assistant. Covers the full framework: PHP Repository API, content types, field types, search, data migrations, SiteAccess multisite config, Twig templating, Page Builder, PIM, commerce cart/orders, permissions, events, workflow, and extensibility patterns.
